description_long: This is a stand-up pouch of Gibs Mayonnaise, featuring a predominantly blue and white color scheme. The front displays a heart-shaped label with the product name and the words 'Creamy & Smooth', accompanied by appetizing images of fries, a burger, and a bowl of mayonnaise. The back of the pouch contains detailed product information, including ingredients, nutritional facts, and branding. The pouch is made of flexible plastic, with a small spout at the top for dispensing the mayonnaise. The sides are narrow and show the continuation of the front and back graphics, with some text visible. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and designed for easy handling and storage.
description: A blue and white stand-up pouch of Gibs Mayonnaise with a spout, featuring food imagery and detailed product information on the back.
description_view_0: The front view shows the heart-shaped Gibs Mayonnaise label, food images, and the product's creamy and smooth branding.
description_view_1: The left side view is very narrow, showing the pouch's slim profile and a partial glimpse of the front and back graphics.
description_view_2: The back view displays detailed product information, including ingredients, nutritional facts, and branding elements.
description_view_3: The right side view is also narrow, with some visible text and a continuation of the front's food imagery.
attribute_brand_logo: A diamond-shaped Gibs logo in red and white is visible at the top center of both the front and back of the pouch.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front label reads 'Mayonnaise Creamy & Smooth' and shows images of fries, a burger, and a bowl of mayonnaise, indicating a classic mayonnaise flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information and ingredients are visible on the back of the pouch, including a nutrition facts panel.
